name: Soba Noodle Supreme
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Spinach, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Steam the asparagus until tender, approximately 8 minutes.
3. Cut the butternut squash in half, remove the seeds and discard them.
4. Place the squash cut side down in a 4 x 8 baking pan with about one-third inch of water and bake for 40 minutes.
5. When cooled, remove the skin from the squash and cut into bite-size pieces.
6. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
7. Serve warm.
